sprites.name: Air Sprite
sprites.description: Increases sprinting speed and jump height. Also nullifies fall damage.
stats: Location: Spotted near high and mountainous areas
abilities: Increases sprinting speed and jump height. Also nullifies fall damage.
effects: Jump height increases with each Level Up!
sprites.spawnInfo: Spotted near high and mountainous areas

sprites.name: Aura Sprite
sprites.description: Gain a Shock Rock charge when you deal enough damage to enemies!
stats: Location: Spotted near high and mountainous areas
abilities: Gain a Shock Rock charge when you deal enough damage to enemies!
effects: Required damage decreases at each Level Up: 175 Damage -> 150 Damage -> 125 Damage -> 100 Damage -> 75 Damage to trigger
sprites.spawnInfo: Spotted near high and mountainous areas

sprites.name: Batman Sprite
sprites.description: Grants the ability to launch in the air and deploy the Bat Cape!
stats: Location: Found rarely in Sprite Chests
abilities: Grants the ability to launch in the air and deploy the Bat Cape!
sprites.spawnInfo: Found rarely in Sprite Chests

sprites.name: Boss Sprite
sprites.description: Grants an increase to your max HP and Shield.
stats: Location: Claimed from defeating a powerful adversary
abilities: Grants an increase to your max HP and Shield.
effects: Increases at each Level Up: 5 HP/Shield -> 10 HP/Shield -> 15 HP/Shield -> 20 HP/Shield -> 25 HP/Shield
sprites.spawnInfo: Claimed from defeating a powerful adversary

sprites.name: Burnt Peanut
sprites.description: Goop! When eliminating players, you may find more loot. Sometimes mythic!
abilities: Goop! When eliminating players, you may find more loot. Sometimes mythic!
effects: Chance increases at each Level Up: 20% -> 30% -> 40% -> 50% -> 60% chance to find more loot. 10% chance to find Mythic at Max Level!
sprites.spawnInfo: Found in Relic Chests

sprites.name: Demon Sprite
sprites.description: Siphon some health and shields when you eliminate an opponent.
stats: Location: Found rarely in Sprite Chests
abilities: Siphon some health and shields when you eliminate an opponent.
effects: Increases in power at each Level Up: 10 Healing -> 15 Healing -> 20 Healing -> 25 Healing -> 30 Healing per elimination
sprites.spawnInfo: Found rarely in Sprite Chests

sprites.name: Dream Sprite
sprites.description: Grants a random item at each level, exploding with legendary loot at Max Level.
stats: Location: Sometimes found sleeping in the storage crates
abilities: Grants a random item at each level, exploding with legendary loot at Max Level.
effects: Loot value increases at each Level Up!
sprites.spawnInfo: Sometimes found sleeping in the storage crates

sprites.name: Duck Sprite
sprites.description: Emoting or Jamming replenishes shields.
stats: Location: Found in the vault of a certain business mogul
abilities: Emoting or Jamming replenishes shields.
effects: Increases in power at each Level Up: 2 Shield -> 3 Shield -> 4 Shield -> 6 Shield -> 8 Shield per tick
sprites.spawnInfo: Found in the vault of a certain business mogul

stats: Location: Found wandering around forests and wooded regions
abilities: You have a chance to find additional rare items when opening chests.
